reviews.review_description:
I love horror and have never screamed out from a movie or a book but this game had me yelling with just about every jump scare! The main enemy is terrifying when seen. Towards the end it becomes more frequent. I loved it. The VR hands become more bloody and scratched throughout the game. I had no bugs or issues with any part of it. Apart from the times I took my headset off and put it down outside of my barrier, then the game sort of lost traction and wouldn't focus, but when I extended my sleep timer it was fine. So it was just my headset. The audio was simply brilliant and horrified me when the shocks came. I enjoyed the main characters voice as well. I thought the ending could have been better, I just really wanted to see more of the Madison enemy. The graphics were great and the interactions were fun too. There were two puzzles which I didn't really care for, but one of those turned to be alright. The other was a ridiculous candle travel puzzle which I spent too long on, until I really took notice and was able to solve it easy enough after that.
This is perfect for VR and I really do hope they make some kind of sequel. Recommend it to horror gamers

Would be crazy to not leave a review for this absolute Banger! This app ticks all the boxes, top class, Mercedes Benz, Dom Perignon, Lamborghini Galliardo running on all 12 cylinders, Michelin 3 star. 
"Two will lie down. One will die. One will live." Jesus, the Gnostic Bible 
"Render unto Caesar that which is Caesar's and render unto God that which is God's." Jesus, the actual Bible 
There are two cultures. 
The first is the culture that recognizes that what is referred to as the afterlife is the next stage of life which is as unimaginable to us now as life outside the womb is to the one going through the stage of life inside the womb. Life is a circle from the enwombed to the entombed. Ghosts in the afterlife operate under a different time dynamic as they are under advanced programming. After death one becomes much more alive than they ever were during the Earth phase of life. On Earth, humans operate under 5G broadband. Ghosts are operating under advanced programming under 1TB broadband! 
Ghost operate under the objective time dynamic of time travel and no longer held under the subjective time dynamic of linear time. Ghosts operate under a different set of physics. Ghosts can teleport and read your mind! 
"Do you travel fast?" asked Scrooge. 
"Upon the wings of the wind." replied the Spirit. 
The second is the discorporeal, ghastly, wretched, dessicated aspect of the husk of the physical body left behind having no more significant to the liberated spirit at this point than a discarded fingernail. The disinterrment process, the forensics area at the basement of the hospital so off the scale Satanic scary that Med students faint when seeing the sheer Satanic visages to be seen there. The trailer was 150 stars out of 10 scary. 
First of all, the music. There are different musical scales that use different sets of notes. The love scale for rock music. The military scale for National anthems. The funerary scale for take a wild guess. But the notes used in the trailer is from the scare scale. The science of scare as advertised is 100% accurate. The music in the trailer was declamatory with notes and tones that don't ever emotionally resolve. 
The red and white tablecloth seen in the trailer was dead on. During bear death experiences and this is having gone through two times when I seen this, a person sees nothing but a fuschia or let's say red colored sky in all directions with soft white clouds that look pink, offset against the fuschia all around. A person typically wakes up frkm a near death experience or out of body experience just screaming as every nerve in their body, even the nerve endings they didn't know they had feel like they were all quickly slid one inch along some fine grade sandpaper. Painful. 
I had a Robert Monroe out of body experience. At least one. Popping out of the top of my head, I took a walk and saw two ghosts of the dead. Negative ghosts. Earthbound spirits shadow figures. Because I was on the same frequency resonance as they were, it got s without saying, if I could see them, they could see me. One was sitting on a bottom step which is symbolic, death being the last step in life. The last key on the piano that Bill Murray knowingly played in Ghostbusters. The ghost on the stairs, a young Native lady of street  class, who died recently, a virago, a gamine, sat with arms folded on her knees she looked at me. Angry, surly, diffident. I walked up the stairs and looked down. As I did that, she looked up at me! Then I was in in room sitting on the bed, still in the out of body experience. The door, not normally open, was open in this out of body experience and I saw a lady who died quite a long time ago, in the 1930s. She walked across the doorway from right to left and then turned her head and just looked at me! She had a black veil covering her entire face! Then she turned her head again and kept on walking as before. She was middle-class wearing a black lace peignoir. It seemed that she was looking for something that she would never find. Self absorbed, righteous indignation, acrimony, diffident, stubborn, was her mood. 
Julius Caesar, just before he died three a white cloth covering his face, 'You do not face me!' 
If emotions could be likened to temperature, standing next to those ghosts was like standing next to an open door of an industrial grade walk in freezer. 
This app is top shelf or else very very bottom shelf which is a massive compliment. 
This app is a gift from Satan. 🤘🤘🤘🤘🤘🤘 Hard core!
#resonance

If you want to know what coming down off smoking cr@ck or injecting c@c@ine without having experienced the initial lift is like,  play M@dison VR.

I'm really disappointed. The game has an incredible storyline—the scariest of all time—but it feels like the developers just dumped it on Quest to make a quick buck. They clearly didn't put much thought into how poorly the game performs. It's almost impossible to cast or record because everything drops after a few seconds. So, if you're hoping to play with someone in the same room to get through the scariest parts, that's not an option. The game froze more times than I can count, and I had to force quit the headset to get out. Some sections took way longer than they should to respond, and sometimes I even had to restart the game to get my actions to register properly. I only realized things weren't working right after watching a PCVR gameplay video to check if I was doing something wrong.
For the discount price I paid, it was definitely worth it! But no more than ten dollars. I understand the game is worth a lot more, but not if it doesn't run properly. 
Btw, I didn't finish the game; I got to about 70%. Not very easy to do alone! Maybe I will finish later, when I forget how terrifying it is.

This game looks awesome until you download it and pay that is when the issues start, witch are crashing, freezing,taking you back to the start of the game, this is a must buy but befor buying who ever made the game needs to seriously fix the problem or it’s just ripping people of I downloaded it for the  second time hoping it would be fixed and still the same problem now they are refusing to refund my money so heads up people check out the comments on it befor buying am gutted I couldn’t play it cheers👍🙂 it’s time wasting and like my butt please take the game down fix it stop selling a cracked game but then of the other hand that’s why he isent taking it down cos some people are so miss leading don’t care  to listen they will just buy it all-fun and games I tell ya

This game is terrifying and has fantastic puzzles, but I cannot play for longer than 10 minutes without my whole device, freezing up. I can’t even turn the device off. I have to do a hard reset that can’t be good for my VR. It’s new. I now only play 5 to 10 minutes at a time and then set it aside because it’s such a good game. I want to complete it. I wish this was fixed.

Ok, this game had low memory and crashing issues. I'm pleased to say, it's now fixed. And
....for horror fans, this is absolutely a must buy. The atmosphere is tense and creepy and there are excellent puzzles to keep your mind busy while the pants are being scared off you! 😱😁 This game is great fun and well worth the money. Hopefully the review team will put this review at the start. All the problems people had with this game are gone. Great for a scary Christmas treat!

reviews.review_title: I want to love it but it’s broken
reviews.review_description:
So it’s fairly buggy but I’ve found how to make it tolerable. 

It’s definitely worth some extra effort. It’s an absolutely terrifying game. I love horror movies and haunted houses and this definitely scratches the itch that no other standalone game does.

1-Make sure you have recently powered on your headset and have not opened any other apps or windows prior to starting the app

2-Keep play sessions short, I’ve found that 30-40 min at a time seems to be the sweet spot before you start to run into frame drops and judders.

3-Do not put headset in standby or try to open your Meta menu using the quick access button on the controller or it will likely freeze your headset and require a reset. 

4-When you start to get consistent frame drops and judders, make sure your progress has recently auto saved and reset your headset by holding the power button and reopen the game following Step-1

5-You may need to look up some tips and walk throughs online as it is very challenging at times.

I would like to get a refund. This game does not load. You pick your settings normal or hard and then you press the start button and it says its loading with a picture of a camera. The loading screen gets to 8% loaded and then it crashes. I have tried over and over and cant get past the first loading screen. While it is loading the sound cuts in and out. It really anoying. I was really excited to play this game but it is unplayable and paying $30 for something that doesnt work sucks.

Although people say the game is glitchy I played on my quest 2 that can hardly run blade and socary with no mods, only one glitch, scared the 💩 out of me and a great game overall, I believe as of now the glitches in this game arnt a thing anymore, the puzzles a super hard for me lol

reviews.review_title: If you're looking for an honest review⬇️
reviews.review_description: I just finished this game yesterday and honestly it's great the puzzles the gameplay the character progression the storyline was fantastic I had such a good time playing this game. The only let down is every time I tried to open my menu my headset would lag out and crash. There's nothing to bad to say about this game and I recommend it. And to the devs if you're reading this please add the possessed camera dlc to the vr version because that would be amazing and I'd definitely buy it.

Re-purchased this after refunding several months ago as I'd heard it had been fixed. Not the case. Still experiencing frequent low memory crashes. Framerate is really inconsistent and immersion breaking. It's a shame as the game on PC is phenomenal.

i give this game 10 out of 10 for jump scares, 10 out of 10 for the story line , don't like many others have said in the reviews there are a lot of glitches and it's pretty difficult to control also you are going to have to watch a tutorial to play any of the game because the puzzles are so hard there's no way you're gonna finish it without a tutorial on some part at least half of the game properly so i give that part of the game three out of 10

I love horror vr so I was really looking forward to this game. Unfortunately the first thing that struck me was that it looked like 1st generation vr graphics. For the price point that is unacceptable. The worst came later. The game is so buggy that it is for all intents and purposes unplayable. Unless these issues are fixed, this is a skip.

Brand new meta quest 3 and the game cant even run. It is truly unplayable and a horrible experience. Too glitchy, you cant even get clear gameplay. Wish there was a better way to get my money back than disputing

The game at the finish line has a great atmosphere and sound and keeps you tense. It's a shame that the mechanics seem old. The interaction with objects is not polished and the textures are of such poor quality. It needs updates and at least in meta 3 a big patch with high quality textures. That a €30 game takes up less than 2GB is a joke.
I can’t get pass the loading screen it keeps glitching out and closing and I can’t get a refund f*** this game ! DO NOT PURCHASE IT !

This is my first review I’ve written on here. The scariest part of this game is how f*%^ing mad it’s making me! I’ve replayed more of the game than I’ve actually played, because it’s constantly crashing and giving me the “low memory” error. I honestly was pumped to try this game in VR and what I DID actually get to play was super scary, but the crashing is killing me! I have tons of memory and all I’ve ever used this quest 3 for is games. Ive only had it for about 6 months too. There are only like 3 games I have that crash consistently and this is one of them. And it’s always the same games that crash.
I read the reviews and still bought it, bro, you can not film this game, it literally doesn’t let you and it closes saying low memory, there isn’t a less quest optimized game available the hell man

Jumped many times,game was so good until you get the same as asgard memory ram problems.Dont know what's going on with the memory full problem on games,dont know if its the games or quest update software,but its that frustrating it needs fixed as puts me off the new headset when it's out.Rather than frustrate customers remove and fix the issues rather than spoiling what could be amazing and stop selling it not working properly.Update now stopped working at the ritual where you get the 2nd key for the door with the statues.A pity a masterpiece of a quest horror game totally ruined.Sad state of affairs with the quest.will change review score if gets fixed.
This game is horrible its glitchy as hell and don't work. What a waste of money. Either fix ur game or send Everyones money back

Crashes every time I try to load in with some low memory or storage message, I have plenty of storage so it's not that. Should start offering refunds if it's not going to be fixed since I'm seeing similar messages from over a month ago.

Update - 8 months later and still can't play the game I paid for.

Horrifying but not in the way you’d hope! Game lags terribly making any jump scares ineffective… that’s if you can even make it to a jump scares without the game crashing for “low memory”. 

I’ve cleared game cache, uninstalled, reinstalled, rebooted headset, anything I can to clear the RAM. The game still crashes after about 10 
minutes of playing

It's the same full fat version as PCVR with the graphical downgrade you would expect given PC specs were reasonably high. So textures, lighting etc take a hit but somehow enough is retained that I'm not missing the extra level of detail. Like Metro Awakening and Propagation Paradise Hotel, the dark setting masks a lot of lower textures so the loss is not much when playing.

The atmosphere is the same. Dread is the same. And somehow it all fits in 1.3Gb! Amazing work.

 Yes, the gripes around some of the VR interactions, the inventory also came across in the port but these are pretty minor complaints. Puzzles are good and it's a tense, scary thrill ride. Scratch that...swap "tense" for "terrifying"!!

Having completed the game, I can safely say that it has easily been one of the best VR experiences I've ever had.

*Update* August 2025
I see a lot of reviews from Quest 2 and 3 owners stating memory, crashing issues with the game. I don't believe the developer has pushed out any new changes or fixes in quite a few months so I'm guessing it's Meta updates have scuppered it as they've been coming thick and fast. Its a shame to have impacted this game for so many :(

reviews.review_title: Keeps crashing with low memory message?
reviews.review_description: Seems like it would be a decent game but it keeps crashing. I lost all my progress and got a message saying "Not enough memory". I have plenty of memory but the game keeps crashing.
The game crashes always with memory leak exceptions. Unplayable on Quest 3

Was having a blast with this game... then it crashed. After reloading the game, my camera no longer faces forward and won't take pictures. Which is pretty game breaking on a game that relies on you taking pictures. This has happened twice, and both times I was at the 50% completion mark. Think I'm done with this one.
Is anyone else having problems with it kicking u off game saying memory full how can this be fixed
Jank city.  Cannot finish the game due to issues.  Should not be in the store.

reviews.review_title: The handling of this port is painful
reviews.review_description:
This is not really a review of the game itself. Managed to get through the first couple hours of it. My experience was marred by crashes and technical problems which necessitated multiple restarts and caused the quest menu to malfunction every time the game app was open. Since I finished those two hours (which is, inconveniently, just enough to be outside the refund window), I have not successfully been able to use this app.... That was two months ago...

Those first two hours were so tense and thrilling despite the technical issues. This really seems like a masterpiece of modern horror. I would love to play through this and give a 5 star review. Because, from what I can tell, it really deserves it. 

Unfortunately, I have never been SO disappointed with the performance of a quest app. This is the ONLY app I've purchased that just straight up stopped working altogether. It's also one of the most expensive apps I've purchased... Only coming in behind the biggest hitters like Batman, Metro and Behemoth. Certainly, based on the first two hours, it seems the proper Madison experience is very much worth the money they're asking for. But, this port is currently straight up broken and is still being sold. DO NOT buy this, unless it gets an update.

I held off on this review to look and wait for more information. Well, I've been scouring the internet over the past month for more information from the developers and have found next to no communication about this broken port. No one saying "sorry about this, we're working on it. We still don't know when it will be complete. We'll keep you in the loop" etc. Just a few other disappointed customers posting about it.

The game itself seems like a gloriously delirious nightmare, and I just really want to have the experience I paid for... Two months ago...

*Update* 7 months after purchase. Still doesn't work. Still no word on whether anyone's fixing this....

I have played this game OK right up to the church and placing the candles, I know where to put the and each time I get two of the candles to set and light, the other two the red Candle (crucifix) and blue candle ( our lady) will not light, I have updated and started again three times, I have tried every combination but cannot get any further.
I have reached out to the game suppliers and meta nothing.
Is there a glitch and how do I get past it.
At the moment I cannot recommend purchasing it as I believe my experience is a glitch and the customer service and help is just not there.

Got to 47% chapel scene - says low memory , yet 400gb available. Cannot continue. Game play clunky also - not impressed.
Tried restarting many times , but still same problem.
Other reviewers have same problem.

Was a great game when I bought it a few months ago played it to 46% had
 a break for a few weeks returned to it today and now just keeps crashing back to my environmental screen a  pity as it was a great game now 1 star will rate it to 5 stars if it gets fixed
Just finished this horror game, this is really the best horror game I’ve ever played! Quest 3 and the graphics and gameplay were great. No errors or glitches that are mentioned in previous reviews.
The game is good but its not letting me record it i tried everything and still nothing. The game needs big fixing update to get rid of this problems and bugs.

Scary game really engaging horror stuff buttttt the game is really messy with the controls almost making it  unplayable im stuck on the mission with the walkie talkie and so is my friend we looked up how to do it and its just like not working unfortunately plz fix some of game breaking game stuff and i will rate it higher but for now wait for sale and 7 out of 10

You really forget how scary these games are until you’re immersed in them.

I thought I had conquered all vr horror. I had not.

The entire experience so far has been TERRIFYING. The sound design, atmosphere, and overall story really makes it 100 times worse(but it’s a horror game so better). It will get your adrenaline rushing no doubt, especially that well part holy crap that was bad for my heart. I did not want to flash the camera. It’s so much worse when you know what will happen.

Okay so I’ve been playing horror for about 3 years now and I heard this game was the scariest vr game ever and I was like yea I’ve heard that before with exorcist legion vr and there was some parts where it got to me but I mean nothing has got your heart pumping a 100 beats per minute in the first 10 minutes of the game just something about it feels unsettling and idk what it was but my stomach started to squeeze and I was freaking out and I thought I was “immune” to the scares but as I got deeper in the game the very first time in playing horror games I quit the game I couldn’t handle it great props to the people who made this game it really is the number one most scariest game on the vr market thanks to anyone who reads this.

reviews.review_title: Game is now broken since last update
reviews.review_description:
EDIT...UPDATE JUNE 1 2025 

Game is still broken on Quest 3 as of June 1st. No help on discord or any updates from devs. Advice is still NOT to purchase until this is fixed. 


I've been enjoying this game but lost all recent saves on the latest update (March 25). Purchase with caution as game is now broken. Since the recent update the game crashes and is unable to be played. I would wait for these issues to be sorted before purchase. Devs do not reply to messages
Fixed the issue give full review once iv beat it

If you’re looking for a game that will truly test your nerves, this game delivers horror in its purest form. From the moment you step foot into the decrepit, shadow-choked house, you know you’re in for something special—and by special, I mean absolutely bone-chilling.

The game thrives on atmosphere. Every creak of the floorboards, distant whisper, and sudden slam of a door feels meticulously crafted to keep your heart racing. The sound design deserves massive praise—it’s not just good, it’s nerve-shreddingly effective. The eerie ambient noises and sudden audio cues play psychological tricks, keeping you in a constant state of dread. This isn’t just a haunted house; it’s an experience in sustained terror.

madison on my quest 2 runs better than on my quest 3. I want to finish the game  on my quest 3 because of the higher resolution but the game stutters a lot, are you guys going to fix that anytime soon.

reviews.review_title: Scariest game in vr hands down!
reviews.review_description: I played this originally on PSVR2 and while this isn’t as graphically impressive it still really nails the atmosphere and tension of the other versions. It’s also convenient in that I can play it standalone and take it to some of my friends houses to scare the crap out of them! Definitely recommend!
Yaaaaaaas

It is crazy this game only has 62 ratings at the time of me posting this review. This game deserves so much more love than it is getting. This is a top notch VR horror game and the house is insanely creepy. This isn’t Resident Evil and it isn’t trying to be. You aren’t going to shoot your way out of this demonically possessed house. You are in there all alone with nothing but a demonic presence to keep you company. You’re armed with an old Polaroid camera and the creepy pictures you take with it. The camera is used to help you advance further into this house of horror and to keep the story moving forward. If you’re a fan of horror games that leave you completely vulnerable and defenseless,you will not find a better game in the Meta Store. I highly recommended this game. it’s sad this game isn’t far more popular than it currently is. This should be a must have for all fans of horror games

reviews.review_title: MADISON VR, VERY SCARY ON ANOTHER LEVEL
reviews.review_description:
Worth the hype, and the money if this is your style of game. I “HIGHLY RECOMMEND” this to any horror fans out there. Games like this aren’t just for pcs any more, and they shouldn’t be. The sound track of this game is on another level. It has amazing sound, and the people who worked on it deserve all the praise. 🦻🏻🙌🏻 The story line is great, and all the jump scares are great. If you are on the fence about getting this game just get it, and you will be amazed. The only thing I do hope for is a Madison 2. Other than that no complaints here. Thank you for this surprising game, and all the hard work put into it. Looking forward to what this company has in store for us VR players next. 

UPDATE: They just pushed the release for the quest 3 graphical upgrade. So worth it!!!

reviews.review_title: The Scariest Game on Meta Quest
reviews.review_description:
Gameplay video available by searching Gamertag VR on YouTube (I do swear a bit 😬)

I’ve featured Madison VR on PSVR2 and the Meta Quest port is definitely a downgrade in visuals in comparison, but not overall I think it’s looks pretty decent and doesn’t change the immersion and fear. Right nowMadison VR is the scariest game I’ve ever played in VR. Now you probably a read a title like that and think it’s click bait but this is on another level.

reviews.review_title: New king of horror games on Quest.
reviews.review_description:
So, I've played a lot of horror games on the platform. They were good, really good, but this game takes the crown. The part where i almost quit was the part where after you put the pictures on the wall with the numbers, and you go into the door with the dark hallway, and it's a maze and you have this woman calling your characters name over and over and you dont know when the jumpscare is going ro happen when your lighter go out. Right there and then, i was done with this game. Good freaking luck trying to get through the rest of the game. I'll finish the game eventually, but right now, i just can't!. It's an amazing horror game. If you love horror games or want to scare the sh*t out someone else new to VR or anyone else in general, I highly highly recommend this game!. Like I said new king of horror games on the Quest. The best! 10 out of 10

2/28/25

Looks like the devs released a optimization update, finally. Thank you guys.🙏

Dont understand all the hate. Game runs flawless for my two play throughs. 
This is a pretty cool game that you can actually just sit back relax and play through. Scary af too. I was startled several times which usually doesn’t happen lol. Good job devs 🤙

Naaah, I bought this game Confident that I was gonna get really scared about Make It through for a couple Youtube videos (wanna start making videos) but Literally The first couple of minutes I was thinking about just refunding it because I actually couldn't. I ended up recording for 33 minutes and getting five to ten minutes into the actual game. If the people that made this game are Reading this you guys did such an incredible job with the atmosphere and sounds. Hearing Doors Creek Open behind me and footsteps and other things are the most terrifying thing you could ever encounter in VR. You guys also did a great job with like everything else. I am 100 % gonna push through this game even if it's at scary as it is. But people with weak Hearts should definitely not play this game since the first five minutes of this game is scarier than anything else I've ever played both in VR and flat screen. 5/5
When I start the game, it starts lagging and after 2,3 mins crash. Very disappointed.

Whilst I'm super happy this game
 came to the quest I'm still a bit annoyed that it is a quest 2 version. Scary as hell but please give us a quest 3 graphics upgrade.

I had very high hopes of genuine fear. Alas, that was not to be. In order for any true fear to be induced, immersion must be total. That was not the case here. The mechanics were immersion breaking. Any time you need to contort your physical hand in unnatural ways to perform an action, then that breaks the immersion. This happened every time an object needed to be picked up or a drawer or lock needed to be opened. 
The jump scares were predictable. And that only made them silly and annoying. Nearly every time the jump scare was predictable and I barely even felt a twinge of goosebumps  and didn't even slow my "walking" for a number of the jump scares.
The atmosphere was great and the sound design was excellent. The puzzles were medium difficulty. I'm sure they would have been slighly more difficult if I had felt any genuine fear.
All that being said, I  will play this over and over because it was enjoyable. But the scariest game ever?
Nah.

Madison has already been scientifically recognised as one of the scariest games out there, and its impact is only heightened with the addition of Virtual Reality. Even though I had played it on PSVR2 before, I still felt those familiar chills and uneasy sensations, proving just how terrifying this game truly is. The storyline, the atmosphere, and the meticulous attention to detail in both the visuals and sound design create an unparalleled level of tension. If you’re on the hunt for a horror game in Virtual Reality and want the absolute scariest experience, Madison VR is the one to choose—just make sure to have some spare pants handy!

reviews.review_title: Scary but very glitchy in v1
reviews.review_description:
Very immersive and spooky, but it’s quite glitchy in its current state. Sometimes takes 5 or more times to try and properly grasp something. Frustrating and breaks the vibe.

Also, it really needs a Quest 3 visual upgrade. But yes it’s scary and fun.
It's scary and I can't play more than 10mins at a time...however I never found the save game button. So I have to start over every time. Lol. Help!

reviews.review_title: Great but please update for quest 3
reviews.review_description: Played about an hour so far and I’m loving it! The atmosphere is amazing but I feel like the graphics could be better, it was obviously optimized for quest 2. Really hoping for a quest 3 update in the near future.

It's hard for me to get scared but was my first and second jump scare in VR. Love it. Did this game twice in non-vr and was eager to do it in VR. Some control could be better like the blue knee section, since you can't grab to thing at once.

When do we have an updated quest 3 version available… been waiting to play this but held back because of bugs..

Cheers
Very immersive scariest game I've played so far definitely needs a graphics update then will update to 5🌟
Starting playing this last night and I am already a big fan. Very immersive with great sound . If you’re a horror game fan then it’s a must buy. 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻
